proposal1.heroHeadline: Donna Grossman Casting is losing 500 hours a year on manual proposals. Here is exactly where it goes.
proposal1.heroSubheadline: Currently, proposals for commercials and campaigns take hours. With our system, they are ready in 47 seconds.
proposal1.problemsIntro: Each of these issues represents an ongoing loss, not just an observation.

problems.title: Wasted Talent Hours
problems.description: Every hour spent drafting proposals is an hour not spent casting talent for top brands. This costs Donna Grossman Casting both time and potential revenue.

problems.title: Delayed Client Responses
problems.description: Manually crafting proposals delays client engagement by days. Every delay risks losing contracts worth thousands.

problems.title: Inconsistent Branding
problems.description: Proposals lack uniformity when crafted manually, potentially confusing clients. This inconsistency can cost deals and damage reputation.

problems.title: Opportunity Costs
problems.description: Time spent on proposals means fewer opportunities to engage with new clients. This results in missed revenue streams.

problems.title: Increased Stress
problems.description: The pressure to produce high-quality proposals quickly is mentally taxing. This stress reduces overall efficiency and effectiveness.

problems.title: Resource Drain
problems.description: Manual proposal writing drains resources that could be used for more strategic tasks, such as talent scouting and client meetings.

proposal1.solutionIntro: Our AI system is the replacement for all these inefficiencies.

solutions.title: Instant Proposal Generation
solutions.description: Currently, proposals are painstakingly written from scratch. Our system generates them instantly, saving valuable time.

solutions.title: Consistent Branding
solutions.description: Manual proposals risk inconsistent branding. Our system ensures every proposal is on-brand, every time.

solutions.title: Real-Time Client Engagement
solutions.description: Client responses are delayed due to slow proposal turnaround. With our system, engage clients in real-time, closing deals faster.

solutions.title: Stress Reduction
solutions.description: The manual process is stressful and error-prone. Our AI reduces stress by handling proposals with precision.

solutions.title: Resource Optimization
solutions.description: Resources are drained by manual processes. Our system frees up resources for strategic growth and client interaction.

proposal1.whyUsIntro: Four reasons this works. Not marketing claims. Engineering facts.

whyUsCards.title: Speed
whyUsCards.description: Every hour your team spends writing proposals is an hour not spent closing deals. This system gives those hours back. Lead data in, live proposal out, 60 seconds.

whyUsCards.title: Personalization
whyUsCards.description: Generic proposals get ignored. Personalized proposals close. The system reads each prospect's website and reflects their services, tone, and positioning back to them. Written from scratch, not templated.

whyUsCards.title: Ownership
whyUsCards.description: No monthly subscription bleeding your budget. No vendor deciding to raise prices or shut down. You own the source code, the infrastructure, and the data. Permanently.

whyUsCards.title: Support
whyUsCards.description: Personal onboarding, a video walkthrough your team can reference anytime, and one week of post-delivery support. You are not left figuring this out alone.

fearCards.title: You are probably thinking: our stack is complicated.
fearCards.sub: CRM, email, Sheets, Slack. The system connects to whatever you already use. No migration.

fearCards.title: You might be wondering if this breaks your current workflow.
fearCards.sub: It runs alongside everything you have. Nothing changes except the time you spend on proposals.

fearCards.title: You are concerned the output will not match your standards.
fearCards.sub: Revisions are part of the build. We configure, test, and refine until the output matches your bar exactly.

proposal1.teamIntro: Your point of contact. No handoffs, no account managers, no layers.

team.name: Ayush Chauhan
team.bio: Full-stack engineer specializing in AI automation for agencies and service businesses. Every engagement personally handled from architecture through deployment. 15+ systems built. Zero failed deliveries. Works async, ships fast.

proposal1.processIntro: What Working With Us Looks Like

process.title: Kickoff (Async or Call)
process.description: We map your workflow, services, and current proposal process. Can be a 15-minute call or handled entirely over email. By the end, we have everything needed to configure the system.

process.title: System Configuration
process.description: The engine gets configured with your services, pricing structure, tone of voice, and brand standards. Every proposal it generates will sound like your best strategist wrote it.

process.title: Build and QA
process.description: Test proposals generated and reviewed against your quality bar. Refinements continue until the output is indistinguishable from what your team produces manually.

process.title: Deployment and Handoff
process.description: Deployed to production with full infrastructure. You receive a video walkthrough, documentation, and complete source code. From this point, the system runs without us.

proposal1.pricingIntro: Two options. Both are one-time builds. No subscriptions, no recurring fees. You own the source code and infrastructure permanently.

pricing.name: Proposal Engine
pricing.subtitle: // Core System
pricing.description: Custom proposal automation configured for Donna Grossman Casting's services, voice, and pricing structure.

pricing.name: Engine + AI Chatbot
pricing.subtitle: // Recommended
pricing.description: Everything above, plus an AI sales assistant embedded in every proposal. Handles objections, answers questions, and books calls for Donna Grossman Casting around the clock.
features: AI chatbot on every proposal page

proposal1.ctaHeadline: See this running on your actual proposals.
proposal1.ctaDescription: Reply here or email Ayush directly. He will send the onboarding form. Takes about 10 minutes and the build starts the same day. Custom-configured for Donna Grossman Casting.

proposal2.heroHeadline: Transform Acme Corp's Engagement through Expert Casting Services.
proposal2.heroSubheadline: Our tailored casting solutions will elevate your brand visibility and audience connection through strategic and professional talent placement.
proposal2.problemsIntro: Acme Corp is currently experiencing significant revenue losses due to underperforming marketing campaigns.

problems.title: Missed Audience Connection
problems.description: Every campaign that fails to engage its audience is a missed opportunity costing you potential sales and brand loyalty.

problems.title: Talent Mismatch
problems.description: Incorrect casting choices lead to a 30% drop in campaign effectiveness, resulting in wasted resources.

problems.title: Overlooked Brand Message
problems.description: When your brand message is not effectively communicated, it results in a 25% loss in potential customer engagement.

problems.title: High Turnover of Talent
problems.description: Frequent changes in talent can disrupt campaign continuity and lead to an inconsistent brand image, costing you credibility.

problems.title: Delayed Campaign Launches
problems.description: Each delay in launching a campaign due to casting issues costs you valuable market share and first-mover advantage.

problems.title: Low Conversion Rates
problems.description: Unengaging talent results in a 20% lower conversion rate, directly impacting your bottom line.

proposal2.solutionIntro: Our solutions strategically address these problems to enhance your campaign success.

solutions.title: Advertising Casting
solutions.description: We select the right talent to perfectly align with your brand's message and audience, boosting engagement.

solutions.title: Print Campaign Casting
solutions.description: Ensures consistency and impact across all print media, maintaining your brand's integrity and appeal.

solutions.title: Integrated Media Casting
solutions.description: Coordinates across media platforms to create a unified brand presence that captivates audiences.

solutions.title: Live Event Casting
solutions.description: Provides dynamic and engaging talent for live events, enhancing audience interaction and brand experience.

proposal2.whyUsIntro: Donna Grossman Casting is the partner you need for impactful casting solutions.

whyUsCards.title: Experienced Team
whyUsCards.description: Our team brings years of industry experience to deliver the best talent for your campaigns.

whyUsCards.title: Tailored Solutions
whyUsCards.description: We provide customized casting strategies that align with your unique brand needs.

whyUsCards.title: Proven Results
whyUsCards.description: Our track record shows increased engagement and conversion for our clients.

whyUsCards.title: Collaborative Approach
whyUsCards.description: We work closely with your team to ensure seamless integration of talent into your campaigns.

proposal2.teamIntro: Our team is dedicated to crafting the perfect casting for your brand.

team.name: Paul Bernstein
team.bio: Paul leads strategy and client relationships, ensuring that our casting solutions drive success for our clients.

proposal2.processIntro: What Working With Us Looks Like

process.title: Discovery & Planning
process.description: We start by understanding your brand and campaign objectives.

process.title: Casting Strategy Development
process.description: We develop a customized casting strategy tailored to your needs.

process.title: Talent Selection & Coordination
process.description: We select and coordinate talent to ensure alignment with your brand.

process.title: Execution & Review
process.description: We oversee the campaign execution and conduct a comprehensive review.

proposal2.pricingIntro: Choose from our investment options to suit your strategic needs.

pricing.name: Basic Package
pricing.description: Ideal for small campaigns and startups.

pricing.name: Recommended Package
pricing.description: Our most popular option, offering comprehensive casting services.

pricing.name: Premium Package
pricing.description: For large-scale campaigns requiring extensive resources.

proposal2.ctaDescription: Let's start a conversation about how we can transform your casting strategy.

lead.company_description:
Donna Grossman Casting is a full service casting company in New York City. Donna Grossman is the CEO and lead Casting Director. We cast for TV, Commercials, Interactive, Film, Theater and Print/Photo shoots.

Our clients include worldwide Directors, Photographers, Producers and Advertising Agencies.

www.donnagrossmancasting.com
